category_sources: source_facts.description says project generator for Rust backend projects; official Gerust docs say it provides architecture and tooling for Rust backend projects.
display_name_sources: Official gerust.rs docs and GitHub README use Gerust; source_facts.name is gerust.
docs_sources: Official gerust.rs documentation has an Intro to Gerust page and architecture documentation for the generated backend structure.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/mainmatter/gerust; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Gerust README/docs mention Rust backend generation, axum, SQLx, PostgreSQL, and CLI project creation.
